creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pkubaj
Date: Mon Sep  7 00:58:07 UTC 2020
New revision: 547872
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/547872

Log:
  Mk/bsd.gecko.mk: fix build with defined CPUTYPE on powerpc64 (and possibly others)

  In /etc/make.conf:
  CPUTYPE?=power9

  When trying to build www/firefox:
